project_area: General administrative and regulatory services for business, charities, voting, professional licensing, notaries, and state athletics
demographic_requirements: No specific demographic requirements mentioned; applicable to licensed professionals, businesses, charities, and voters in Pennsylvania
eligibility_summary: Open to Pennsylvania-based businesses, charities, licensed professionals, notaries, voters, and athletic participants. Specific eligibility depends on the program (e.g., business registration, charity licensing, professional licensing renewal, notary application, or athletic competition).
